columnNotes.Name: Not all of these are student apartments, and residents are not necessarily students. If a Fall 2026 to Fall 2027 early-bird quote is available, that quote is used; otherwise the current listed price is used. Green rows in the original sheet indicate places labeled as student housing on Google Maps.
columnNotes.Layouts: 2b2.5b is calculated as 2b2b. Only available floor plans are included.
columnNotes.Size: Size of the lowest-price floor plan.
columnNotes.Min Price Per Person: Average per person based on bedroom count.
columnNotes.Bus/shuttle: Wait time is not included. Transit routes were checked for Monday 8:00 AM.
columnNotes.Google Reviews: Manually summarized. An issue is only listed if at least two reviews mentioned it within the past year.
columnNotes.Fees (if disclosed, excluding applicatio: Only publicly disclosed free or charged items are included. One-time move-in fees are excluded.
columnNotes.Community Amenities (Sports): Based on apartment descriptions and photos, so omissions are possible, especially for printers.
